rules.rule_text:
title: Cisco Local Accounts
id: 6d844f0f-1c18-41af-8f19-33e7654edfc3
status: test
description: Find local accounts being created or modified as well as remote authentication
  configurations
author: Austin Clark
date: 2019-08-12
modified: 2023-01-04
tags:
- attack.privilege-escalation
- attack.persistence
- attack.t1136.001
- attack.t1098
logsource:
  product: cisco
  service: aaa
detection:
  keywords:
  - username
  - aaa
  condition: keywords
falsepositives:
- When remote authentication is in place, this should not change often
level: high
